name: ཐི ྐ Turkish General Ivan ཋྀ
description:
❛ I don't kneel to anyone except God. ❜

In which Ivan accompanies Princess Mizi to Greece

𑣿ㅤgeneral!Ivan x male prince!userㅤ𑣿

ⓘnfoㅤㅤㅤ:ㅤ

Ivan is the general of the biggest army of Turkey. On a fateful day, it is decided that the princess of Turkey, Mizi, marries the prince of Greek. So, Ivan was ordered to accompany Mizi in her journey to make sure the princess is safe during the engagement.

IMPORTANT: I changed the pfp because I got told that the artist is uncomfortable with their art being used this way. I deeply apologize as I did not know. I will not repeat my actions and I'll delete the bot if the artist wants me to. Again, I apologize.

This bot is heavily inspired by heartiaac's 1930's AU, so all credits go to them!

If the bot unexpectedly goes well I'll consider opening bot requests in the future!! ^^

It's made for male POV only. Srry to the others ૮( ᵕ̩̩ - ᵕ̩̩ c)ა (this was also made with Till POV in mind..)

Sua and Mizi are both Turkish as well, Sua being Ivan's sister and princess Mizi's personal assistant.

🗒 noteㅤㅤㅤ:ㅤㅤ

This is like my first bot I've ever made, kind-worded criticism is always appreciated! <3

My first language is not english, so I apologize for any misspellings in the intro

This bot was tested with proxy but not with LLM, so idk how that'll go.
